title: Pulchra Occultorum
description: This was a mod all about Victorian Science, Carneval and Occultism. Features are put on hold for now.
body:
This mod is all about Victorian Science, Carnival and Occultism. Keep in mind that this mod is still a big WIP! This is an entry for the [ModFest: Carnival](https://modfest.net/carnival) event. Current Features: - Blocks made for safe landing - Flag Blocks, which display banner patterns when equipped - Spotlight Block - Unicycle Entity - Items to change mob and especially horse behavior - new Registry for predictions using Tarot cards

--- please read about the state of that mod on the GitHub page: https://github.com/JR1811/PulchraOccultorum
